name: Donald Hunsberger
abstract: Donald Ross Hunsberger  (August 2, 1932 – November 5, 2023) was an American conductor and arranger. He served as the conductor of the Eastman Wind Ensemble from 1965 until 2002.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Rivello
about_quotes.evidence: I copied for ... Donald Hunsberger with all the wind ensemble stuff
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Rivello interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012
